message:
The other night, we had a little scare when a storm warning popped up on our phones. You know the drill—everyone rushing around, checking windows and gathering supplies. In the midst of it all, our family group chat lit up like a Christmas tree! My sister sent a GIF of a cat looking panicked, while my brother was trying to remember if we had enough batteries for the flashlight. It was chaotic but also kind of hilarious, a reminder that we’re all in this together. 

As we shared our own checklists and made sure everyone was ready, I realized how important it is to have a plan—and a little humor goes a long way. A quick refresher on what to pack in our go-bags really helped keep things light and practical. How do you all keep the mood up when preparing for the unexpected?
